message:
test(server): add edge case tests for multi-client, idempotent stop, idle shutdown

- server_multiple_clients: verify concurrent accepts, unique IDs, partial close
- server_stop_idempotent: verify double-stop doesn't crash
- server_shutdown_idle_goes_stopped: verify shutdown before listen fails correctly

12/12 server tests now pass (up from 9).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
